title: senecio sphaerocephalus
intro: Senecio sphaerocephalus, also known as the round-headed groundsel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect the liver and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio sphaerocephalus include its ability to support liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio sphaerocephalus can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support liver health and reduce inflammation.
